name: arborist/get_semantic_skeleton
title: Get Semantic Skeleton
description: Read semantic source information without writing project files. Legacy JSON-RPC method: arborist/get_semantic_skeleton.

file_path.description: Source file path. Python and C extensions are supported; .hpp and .hh use the C grammar, not full C++ parsing.

source.description: Optional unsaved source buffer to analyze instead of reading from disk.

result.description: JSON object result returned by Arborist for this tool.

file_path.description: Source file path. Python and C extensions are supported; .hpp and .hh use the C grammar, not full C++ parsing.

max_files.description: Maximum source files to scan while indexing a workspace. Must be greater than zero.

result.description: Persisted symbol-index rebuild or refresh statistics.

rebuilt_files.description: Number of files rebuilt during this operation.

reused_files.description: Number of indexed files reused from prior state.

name: arborist/inspect_symbol_index
title: Inspect Symbol Index
description: Build, refresh, register, or inspect persisted symbol indexes. Legacy JSON-RPC method: arborist/inspect_symbol_index.

result.description: Read-only diagnostic summary for a persisted symbol index.

response_schema_version.description: Version of the inspect_symbol_index response schema.

ok.description: Whether the index passed all inspected health checks.

expected_schema_version.description: Schema version supported by this Arborist build.

stale_files.description: Indexed files whose current content no longer matches persisted fingerprints.

missing_files.description: Indexed files that no longer exist on disk.

unreadable_files.description: Indexed files that exist but could not be read during freshness inspection.

issues.description: Human-readable health issues. Empty when ok is true.

title: Execute Tree Query
description: Read semantic source information without writing project files. Legacy JSON-RPC method: arborist/execute_tree_query.

file_path.description: Source file path. Python and C extensions are supported; .hpp and .hh use the C grammar, not full C++ parsing.

query.description: Tree-sitter query or symbol search text.

source.description: Optional unsaved source buffer to analyze instead of reading from disk.

max_captures.description: Maximum Tree-sitter query captures to return. Must be greater than zero.

items.description: Tree-sitter query capture with optional Arborist owner metadata.

capture_name.description: Tree-sitter capture name without the @ prefix.

start_byte.description: Inclusive start byte of the captured node.

end_byte.description: Exclusive end byte of the captured node.
